health_conditions: partial tear(s) to multiple elbow ligaments/tendons

benefits.description: All injected ligament/tendon areas healed with zero pain remaining; back to intensive biking (~15 hrs/week) approximately 5 days after first dose; untreated control ligament still had strong pain
Restored range of motion and functional recovery from partial ligament/tendon tears in elbow region within ~5 days of administration

protocol_notes: Injury occurred 1.5 weeks before starting BPC-157. No anti-inflammatory or other drugs used. 150mcg injected subcutaneously to each affected area once daily for 5 days. One ligament deliberately left untreated as a control. Post-injection vibration massage and gentle stretching performed. Administration began ~1.5 weeks post-injury. Sourced from canadapeptides.
